data.title: Robinhood Announces Futures Trading, Index Options Trading
data.description: Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev announced the launch of futures trading and index options trading in a major expansion of the platform's offerings.

data.title: Trump, Harris Consider Joe Rogan Podcast: Could Spotify Ride 2024 Election Wave? Analyst Says Company In 'Sweet Spot Of Growth'
data.description: Spotify stock could benefit from appearances by Vice President Kamala Harris or Donald Trump on The Joe Rogan Experience Podcast.

data.title: Calumet, Gevo Shares Are Soaring Wednesday: What's Going On?
data.description: Shares of Calumet and Gevo are on the move in extended trading Wednesday after the companies received conditional commitments from the U.S. Department of Energy (DOE).

data.title: Pepsi Fights Back Against Shrinkflation: Why Your Chip Bags Will Be Fuller In The Future
data.description: PepsiCo says it will be adding more chips to some bags in a move designed to please consumers that have grown tired of "shrinkflation."

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin Trade Like 'No Bear Market On The Horizon,' Trader Predicts All-Time High In The 'Next 3-4 Weeks'
data.description: Cryptocurrency markets are trading higher, taking 96% Bitcoin holders into profit.
